title: bromus ramosus subsp. serotinus
intro: Bromus ramosus subsp. serotinus, also known as the late bent, is a subspecies of the perennial grass species Bromus ramosus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and joint pain. The health benefits of Bromus ramosus subsp. serotinus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
